input.background: The prevalence of a condition in a population is 10%. You take a simple random sample of 15 people from this population. Let X represent the number of individuals in the sample with the condition.
input.question: At what number of cases would you start to believe the assumed prevalence in the population is greater than 10%?

output.method: 事件发生概率及独立性

prevalence.description: The assumed prevalence of the condition in the population.

sample_size.description: The number of individuals in the random sample taken from the population.

X.description: The number of individuals in the sample with the condition.
